description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a spacious front terrace enclosed by glass railings. The front facade features large sliding glass doors, providing access to the interior living space and allowing ample natural light. The terrace is furnished with contemporary chairs and a round table, suggesting an outdoor seating or dining area. The structure is primarily composed of smooth, light-colored materials, with dark accents around the windows and doors. The rear and side walls are solid and windowless, emphasizing privacy and a minimalist aesthetic. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large sliding glass doors, and a glass-railed terrace featuring outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the terrace, glass railings, sliding glass doors, and visible interior furnishings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the terrace, glass railing, and a single chair; the solid wall dominates this angle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a completely solid, windowless wall and the flat roof.
description_view_3: Angled view from the terrace corner, showing the round table, chairs, and partial interior through the glass doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and sliding glass doors on the front, no windows on sides or rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry via large sliding glass doors opening onto a covered terrace with glass railings and no visible steps or columns.
